label: Allocation Weights
description: Dual waterfall showing coin allocation weights and per-coin venue weights for the active DeFi strategy.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. requiredEntitlements=["execution-basic","execution-full"] and availableOn=["defi"] non-empty. No any types or @ts-ignore. No lib/mocks imports in widget file. Loading state added (isLoading stub with comment to wire when context exposes the field). Empty state: Pillar 1 guards coins.length===0, Pillar 2 shows prompt to select coin. Error state added (error stub matching peer pattern). Dead code removed: _props parameter retained for ComponentType<WidgetComponentProps> compatibility (standard _-prefix convention for intentionally unused props).

1.1.note: — widget reads waterfallWeights exclusively via useDeFiData() hook, no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: — defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 44 import, line 188 destructure) and filters tradeHistory by scopeStrategyIds.

1.3.note: — hasDefiDesk memo checks globalScope.organizationIds; adjustedTokenBalances, adjustedLendingProtocols, and getBridgeRoutes all gate on org filter.

1.4.note: — client filter cascades through hasDefiDesk which reads organizationIds (client IDs checked via CLIENTS.some).

1.5.note: — strategy filter applied to tradeHistory via scopeStrategyIds filter on ledger orders.

1.6.note: — empty organizationIds returns true for hasDefiDesk (all data shown); empty strategyIds skips filter (all ledger orders included).

1.7.note: NOTE — MOCK_WATERFALL_WEIGHTS_PATRICK is sourced from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (in the context, not the widget). This is acceptable per spec: the widget itself has no mock imports; the context is the appropriate location for mock data in a mock-API environment. Reference constants (DEFI_CHAINS) are correctly in lib/config/.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — widget reads waterfallWeights exclusively via useDeFiData() hook, no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2 PASS — defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 44 import, line 188 destructure) and filters tradeHistory by scopeStrategyIds. 1.3 PASS — hasDefiDesk memo checks globalScope.organizationIds; adjustedTokenBalances, adjustedLendingProtocols, and getBridgeRoutes all gate on org filter. 1.4 PASS — client filter cascades through hasDefiDesk which reads organizationIds (client IDs checked via CLIENTS.some). 1.5 PASS — strategy filter applied to tradeHistory via scopeStrategyIds filter on ledger orders. 1.6 PASS — empty organizationIds returns true for hasDefiDesk (all data shown); empty strategyIds skips filter (all ledger orders included). 1.7 NOTE — MOCK_WATERFALL_WEIGHTS_PATRICK is sourced from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (in the context, not the widget). This is acceptable per spec: the widget itself has no mock imports; the context is the appropriate location for mock data in a mock-API environment. Reference constants (DEFI_CHAINS) are correctly in lib/config/.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

gaps.notes: CARRY_BASIS_PERP §6 DeFi/spot + perp (cross chain): Bridge latency breaks LEADER_HEDGE deadline — needs longer max_hedge_delay_ms config + bridge state machine integration

knownIssues: defi-data-context.tsx does not yet expose isLoading or error fields — loading/error stubs in widget are placeholder until context is updated (tracked as a context-level concern, not widget-level)

findings.description: 0.6 Loading state: DeFiDataContext is synchronous (mock) and does not expose isLoading. Added isLoading=false stub with comment matching peer pattern (defi-rates-overview, defi-trade-history). Ready to wire when context adds the field.
0.8 Error state: No error guard existed. Added error=null stub with early-return error UI matching peer pattern. Ready to wire when context adds the field.

1.7 Reference data: MOCK_WATERFALL_WEIGHTS_PATRICK is in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough, imported in defi-data-context.tsx (not in the widget). This is the correct location per spec — context is the boundary for mock data. No widget-level mock import exists.
